eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Berkeley, SC; at 01:25 PM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 03:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Residents in the Blind Flight Street area need to evacuate due to safety due to wild fires. Residents should evacuate towards Clements Ferry Road.
